title: Thai-Style Indian Potato Salad
description: A creamy and flavorful salad that combines the richness of Indian cuisine with the bold flavors of Thai cuisine. Serve as a side dish or light lunch.
instructions: Boil the potatoes until tender, about 15 minutes.
In a bowl, whisk together the silky yum sauce, chopped cilantro, salt, ground cumin, and ground cayenne pepper.
Drain the cooked potatoes and let them cool slightly.
Add the grated ginger to the sauce and mix well.
In a large bowl, combine the cooled potatoes and the sauce mixture.
Mix well until the potatoes are fully coated with the sauce.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
